intent: Implements issue #46: ship the plumbline Claude Skill (skills/plumbline/SKILL.md) plus Claude Code plugin packaging (.claude-plugin/plugin.json + marketplace.json, repo doubles as its own single-plugin marketplace via source './') and a README 'Teach your agent the gate' section. The action enforces; this teaches: the per-repo AGENTS.md that plumb init scaffolds is repo-scoped and drifts, while the skill travels with a user's Claude across every gated repo — loading on .plumbline/ detection or gate-related intent — and carries the judgment layer: honest receipt-writing (intent/validation_plan/evidence), turn-based verdict handling (APPROVE / REWORK / REVIEW), the known footguns (ci_covered vs manual evidence, protected-path floor, per-PR receipts, rebase re-stamp), and the ethics of never gaming or routing around the gate. Docs-only + JSON packaging; no gate/src behavior change; npm files array untouched.

validation_plan.reason: full node:test suite stays green — proves the docs/packaging change breaks no gate behavior
repo still type-checks (no src touched; guards against accidental source edits)

validation_plan.command: npm run bundle && git diff --exit-code dist/index.js
validation_plan.reason: committed esbuild bundle unchanged — confirms docs-only change, dist-check CI job passes
both plugin manifests are valid JSON
manifests conform to current Claude Code plugin/marketplace schema (checked against code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins)

every command, flag, env var, verdict name, and receipt field documented in SKILL.md cross-checked against the v0.2.3 CLI help + schema output, CHANGELOG 0.2.2/0.2.3, and templates/AGENTS.md — the skill must not contradict what the tool actually does

execution_evidence.output_ref: # tests 223 / # pass 223 / # fail 0 (also CI-covered by the 'test' check)

execution_evidence.command: npm run bundle && git diff --exit-code dist/index.js
execution_evidence.output_ref: git diff clean — committed bundle matches source (docs-only change)
'Validation passed' (after adding the marketplace description the first run warned about)

SKILL.md verified against v0.2.3 build from this branch: commands (propose/receipt --write/--check/check/--review/schema/run/archive), verdicts (APPROVE/REWORK/REVIEW, advisory, convergence cap after 2 rounds), receipt fields + status enum passed|failed|skipped, ci_covered semantics, 3-dot committed-HEAD diff hash, env vars (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, PLUMBLINE_MODEL/PROVIDER/API_BASE/API_KEY), 'shape pre-flight PASS/FAIL' banner wording (src/cli.ts:708)

result_summary: Added skills/plumbline/SKILL.md (~230-line gate-native operator playbook: detect .plumbline//.proofgate, propose->work->receipt --write->check->PR loop, receipt-writing quality, turn-based APPROVE/REWORK/REVIEW semantics incl. convergent re-review + round cap, four footguns, ethics section, command quick-reference), .claude-plugin/plugin.json + marketplace.json (plugin name 'plumbline' v0.2.3 matching package.json; repo is its own marketplace 'amos-labs' with source './', so install is '/plugin marketplace add amos-labs/plumbline' + '/plugin install plumbline@amos-labs'), and a README 'Teach your agent the gate' section placed after the agent-installable Quick start. Verified: 223/223 tests, tsc clean, dist bundle unchanged, JSON valid, 'claude plugin validate' passes, and every documented command/flag/verdict/field cross-checked against the v0.2.3 CLI help + schema output. New files only; no gate logic, npm 'files' array, or scaffolded AGENTS.md content changed.
